zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernhard von Wölpe II於大約1145年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 尼波-維艾利善根額爾時，他的父親Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I26歲，母親Richenza27歲。他於大約1216年與Gräfin Kunigunde von Wernigerode結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1221年1月28日享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wölpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ethiopian: from the personal name Wolde, which is interpreted as ‘my son’ in the Ge’ez or Amharic languages. It often forms part of a Christian name, such as Woldemariam , and in this case it translates as ‘son of’. — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

North German: habitational name from either of two places so named in Mecklenburg or Pomerania or from Wolda in Lower Saxony. Possibly also a topographic name from an inflected form of Middle Low German wolt, walt ‘woods’.

variants.name: Woldemariam
meanings: Ethiopian (also Wolde Mariam): from the male personal name Wolde Mariam, which has the Christian religious meaning ‘son of Mary’ (see Wolde and Mariam ). — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Woldemichael
meanings: Ethiopian (also Wolde Michael): from the personal name Wolde Michael, which has the Christian religious meaning ‘son of St. Michael’ (see Wolde and Michael ). — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

nameMeanings.name: Bernhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernhard von Wölpe II was born about 1145, in Wölpe, Erichshagen, Nienburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I, was 26 and his mother, Richenza, was 27. He married Gräfin Kunigunde von Wernigerode about 1216. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 28 January 1221, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernhard von Wölpe II est né environ 1145, à Wölpe, Erichshagen, Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Richenza, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Gräfin Kunigunde von Wernigerode environ 1216. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 28 janvier 1221, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernhard von Wölpe II um 1145 in Wölpe, Erichshagen, Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I 26 und seine Mutter Richenza 27. Er hat um 1216 Gräfin Kunigunde von Wernigerode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 28. Januar 1221 im Alter von 77 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernhard von Wölpe II è nato il circa 1145 nel Wölpe, Erichshagen, Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Richenza, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Gräfin Kunigunde von Wernigerode circa 1216. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 gennaio 1221, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Bernhard von Wölpe II(이)가 대략 1145년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 니버그-w세르 에리크샤겐 wo프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Richenza(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1216년 Gräfin Kunigunde von Wernigerode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1221년 1월 28일 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernhard von Wölpe II nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Wölpe, Erichshagen, Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Richenza, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Gräfin Kunigunde von Wernigerode aproximadamente 1216. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1221, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernhard von Wölpe II родился около 1145 г. в местности вoлп, эричшаджен, ландкрис ниенбург-весир, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Richenza, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Gräfin Kunigunde von Wernigerode около 1216 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 28 января 1221 г. в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernhard von Wölpe II nació aproximadamente 1145, en Wölpe, Erichshagen, Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Richenza, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Gräfin Kunigunde von Wernigerode aproximadamente 1216. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de enero de 1221, a la edad de 77 años.
